summary: Graphical application for personal financial accounting with multicurrency support, import/export, tags, budgets, debts, assets, and goals
description: Ledgera personal finance desktop app with multicurrency support, import and export flows, budgets, debts, assets, and reports.

This release hardens the desktop updater contract: packaged Linux deb/rpm installs can persist a downloaded update across restart, switch the primary action to installation, and clean up the downloaded package only after the next successful upgraded launch, while AppImage and source-mode runtimes stay on the manual GitHub Releases path.
release_notes: Packaged desktop updater flows now persist downloaded update state across restart and switch the primary action to installation instead of forcing a second download.
Downloaded installer and package artifacts are now cleaned up only after the next successful launch of the target-or-newer version.
Packaged Linux updater behavior is stricter and more honest: unknown package-type installs stay on the manual path, and terminal handoff now preflights the required apt or dnf package manager.
Updater cleanup gating now handles same-core stable and prerelease version comparisons correctly during startup reconciliation.
The deferred startup busy surface and first-run initial setup wizard were polished to better match the current desktop shell.
